concerns.text: T017 (generate dataset size report) is placed before T018 (save raw/cleaned data). Report generation depends on saved data artifacts; reorder T018 before T017 to respect producer-consumer flow.
T019 (filter to hyperbolic knots) is placed before T040 (validate hyperbolic volume data). Validation should precede filtering based on validated criteria. Reorder T040 before T019.
T015 (implement parser with tie-breaking rules) is placed before T030 (document tie-breaking rules). Implementation should follow documented rules. Reorder T030 before T015 or move T030 to Phase 2.
T054 (documentation updates checklist) is placed before T054a (generate invariant_algorithms.md). Checklist verification should follow document creation. Reorder T054a before T054.
T019 logs excluded knots in Phase 3, T047 logs excluded knots again in Phase 6. Consolidate into single task to avoid duplicate work. Consider moving T047 to Phase 3 or removing as redundant.
